channel.title: Services on UIC-STAT HPC
channel.description: Recent content in Services on UIC-STAT HPC

item.title: Tutorial
item.description: Topic: Collaborating and Converging Speaker: Terence Lau (STAT Year 3) Location: T8-306 (BNU-HKBU UIC) Time: 2018.11.11 20:00-21:00 Resources: Slide (This slide is made with reveal.js, please download the whole folder and open the index.html to start.)
